title: MA 104: Introduction to Ordinary Differential Equations

frontMatter.title: MA 104: Introduction to Ordinary Differential Equations
frontMatter.lecture_name: Basic Concepts and First Order ODEs
frontMatter.topic: Introduction to ODEs, First Order ODEs, Solution Methods
frontMatter.summary: This lecture introduces Ordinary Differential Equations (ODEs), their definitions, classification by order, basic solution concepts, and methods for solving first-order ODEs including separation of variables, homogeneous, and exact equations.

key_formulas.name: Implicit Form of First-Order ODE
key_formulas.note: General representation for a first-order ODE.

key_formulas.name: Explicit Form of First-Order ODE
key_formulas.note: Derivative is expressed directly as a function of $x$ and $y$.

key_formulas.name: Exponential Growth/Decay ODE
key_formulas.note: Describes quantities whose rate of change is proportional to their current value.

key_formulas.name: Solution to Exponential Growth/Decay
key_formulas.note: The general solution to $y' = ky$, where $c$ is an arbitrary constant.

key_formulas.name: Separable First-Order ODE
key_formulas.note: An ODE where variables can be algebraically separated for integration.

key_formulas.name: Homogeneous First-Order ODE Test
key_formulas.note: Condition for $y' = f(x,y)$ to be homogeneous (degree 0).

key_formulas.name: Homogeneous Substitution
key_formulas.formula: $u = y/x \implies y = ux \implies y' = u'x + u$
key_formulas.note: Substitution used to transform a homogeneous ODE into a separable one.

key_formulas.name: Exact Differential Equation Condition
key_formulas.note: Condition for $M(x,y)dx + N(x,y)dy = 0$ to be exact.

key_formulas.name: Solution to Exact Equation
key_formulas.note: The general solution, where $du = Mdx + Ndy$ and $C$ is an arbitrary constant.

next.title: Existence and Uniqueness Theorem & Picard's Iteration Method
